main.description: Destroy a group: remove it from the group service (credentials, member index, and per-group database). The underlying PDS account is left untouched — only the service's record of the group is removed, so the account can be re-imported later. Requires the owner role.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the target group. Passed on the querystring (destroy takes no request body). Optional during the #27 deprecation window: omit it and the group is taken from the (deprecated) JWT aud claim instead.
